AT0050.title: Auto-Posting Bots
AT0050.description: An auto-posting bot is an automated tool that can bulk-post messages, comments, or replies on forums, social media platforms, and blogs for purposes such as spam flooding, traffic diversion, promotion, or public opinion manipulation. These bots typically feature multi-account management, content template variable substitution, scheduled posting, auto-bumping, CAPTCHA recognition, and the ability to simulate real user behavior to bypass basic platform defenses. In gray/black market scenarios, auto-posting bots are widely used for spam campaigns, astroturfing, SEO backlink building, and fake content dissemination.

references.title: How Are Auto-Scripting Tools Like Key Wizard Punished
